title: Video: Stay Well This Season | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC
text:
COVID-19 
Seasonal Flu 
Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) 
Respiratory Illnesses 
Video: Stay Well This Season 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this video and sample messages to share core prevention strategies people can use to protect themselves from respiratory illnesses, like flu, RSV, and COVID-19. 
Videos are formatted for Meta (Facebook, Instagram) and X. 
Format: MP4 Language: English (US) Length:

Learn about core prevention strategies you can use to help keep from getting sick with a respiratory... 
Low Resolution 
Aug. 26, 2025 
Sample messages 
For general audiences 
Message 1 
Did you know there are steps you can take to help prevent getting sick from respiratory illnesses? If you, or someone you love, is at higher risk of serious illness from a respiratory illness, now's the time to act. Watch this quick video to learn how to prepare and protect yourself and those around you this season https://bit.ly/4mVji7y 
Message 2 
Want to avoid getting sick with a respiratory illness this season? Well, you don’t have to go too far out of your way
